summary: Iteration 50 - Complete audit of all dashboard statistics endpoints. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend dashboards (Cooperative, Admin) render correctly without 500 errors, KeyErrors, or TypeErrors. Previous issues (round(None), trees_count, total_producteurs) have been fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 user types (Admin, Cooperative, Field Agent, Farmer) can login successfully
Cooperative dashboard returns correct stats: 3 members, 3 parcels, 10.5 ha, 2 agents for Bielaghana
Admin realtime-dashboard handles None values correctly with 'or 0' fallbacks (line 532-533 in admin.py)
Farmer dashboard includes trees_count field with proper None handling (line 320 in greenlink.py)
SSRTE stats/overview correctly filters by recorded_by for field agents (line 952-954 in ssrte.py)
ICI metrics/calculate returns total_producteurs without errors (line 737-738 in ici_data_collection.py)
All round() calls have proper None guards to prevent TypeError

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Both Cooperative and Admin dashboards render correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard statistics endpoints are working correctly. Cooperative Bielaghana has 3 members (KINDA YABRE, Koffi, Balde ibo), 3 parcels, 10.5 ha total, 2 agents. Admin dashboard shows 68 users, 10 cooperatives. All previous KeyError and TypeError issues have been resolved.

cooperative_dashboard.GET /api/cooperative/dashboard: PASS - Returns members, parcels, agents stats

ssrte_dashboard.GET /api/ssrte/stats/overview: PASS - Returns visits and cases stats

cooperative_dashboard.stats_display: PASS - Shows 3 members, 3 parcels, 10.5 ha, 2 agents
cooperative_dashboard.members_section: PASS - Shows KINDA YABRE, Koffi, Balde ibo
cooperative_dashboard.no_errors: PASS - No 500 errors or console errors

admin_dashboard.user_distribution: PASS - Shows breakdown by user type
admin_dashboard.no_errors: PASS - No 500 errors or console errors
